schema.idea: Inverse correlation between e-commerce returns and consumer sentiment

data.source: FedEx and UPS return volume data, University of Michigan Consumer Sentiment Index

schema.behavior: When consumer sentiment declines, e-commerce return volumes increase as consumers are more likely to send back online purchases, signaling weakening consumer demand.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary stocks are sensitive to changes in consumer confidence and spending patterns.

trade_logic.entry: If consumer sentiment index decreases 5% month-over-month and e-commerce return volume increases 10% month-over-month
trade_logic.exit: If consumer sentiment index increases 5% month-over-month or e-commerce return volume decreases 10% month-over-month
